svg.title: Country evidence mesh with selectable Registry Stack topologies
svg.desc: A country's civil, clinical health, public health, social protection, agriculture, and education systems keep their source data. Registry Stack projects can deploy Relay only, source-free Notary only, or both products. Relay returns governed typed outputs, and combined projects turn compiler-pinned consultation outputs into minimized claims. A Social Protection MIS owns the eligibility decision and reads the registry it owns directly. The DHIS2 example uses a reviewed Rhai script rather than a product-specific executor.
svg.text: Each project selects the products its evidence path needs.
Deploy Relay only, source-free Notary only, or both products in one Registry Stack project.
Relay returns typed consultation outputs; Notary evaluates minimized claims.
Combines attestations with its own data.
Via Relay: reviewed snapshot, HTTP, DCI, FHIR, or Rhai script integration
Badge: Relay only, Notary only, or combined
Direct read of its own registry
Registry Stack · evidence-exchange reference architecture · illustrative country example (systems shown are representative)
